subject: Low Engagement and Failing Grades
description: Student has logged in fewer than 5 times in the past month across three courses. Assignment submission rate below 50%. Advisor flagged for urgent outreach.

subject: Credit Deficit — Graduation Timeline at Risk
description: Student is 12 credits behind the expected pace for their cohort. Must take additional load or summer courses to graduate on time.

subject: Repeated Course Withdrawals
description: Student has withdrawn from 4 courses in two semesters, triggering advisor hold.

subject: Reported Personal Difficulties Affecting Studies
description: Student self-reported family issues impacting attendance and focus. Referred to counseling.

subject: Risk of Financial Aid Suspension
description: GPA dropped below renewal threshold. Financial aid officer and advisor to collaborate on support plan.
